creator: ecyoung@mygrande.net
text:
(In reply to Carter from comment #0)
According to the Gentoo package database, and yes I know this isn't Gentoo(since FreeBSD and Gentoo are both source based):

https://packages.gentoo.org/packages/x11-wm/muffin

looks like we need a commit to update to at least 2.8.5.  Let me know and I'll look through the Makefile for the other dependencies, and either create a TRACKER or some other DEPENDS type bug with a List of all affected packages needed to get a newer cinnamon running.
